MouseKart RacerPro is a cozy, fast-paced arcade starring a cheese-loving mouse.
It packs two very different games plus a "burrow" of progress features into
one bright, playful app. Built for casual players of any age who want quick,
satisfying fun in short bursts.

Features:
- Two games in one: Cheese Tide (2D arcade) and Mouse Kart (3D racing).
- Power-ups & Fever Mode: magnets, time boosts, extra lives, and combo-fueled frenzies.
- Daily Nibble: a fresh daily goal with cheese rewards and a growing streak.
- Trophy Den: 9 unlockable achievements that track your milestones.
- Stats: high scores, accuracy, best combo, play time, and recent-form charts.
- Customize: unlock 10 collectible mouse skins with the cheese you earn.
- Cheese coins & daily streaks that reward you for coming back.

How to Play:
1. Tap Quick Play, or choose a game under "Pick a Game".
2. Cheese Tide: hold and drag to draw a current that pulls falling cheese into
   your burrow — and shoves traps away.
3. Chain catches for combos, grab power-ups, and trigger Fever for double points.
4. Mouse Kart: steer your kart around the Cheese Circuit and race for the best run.
5. Earn cheese, beat your high scores, finish the Daily, and spend cheese on new
   skins in Customize.

Benefits:
- Easy to learn, hard to master — instant fun with a real skill ceiling.
- Bite-sized rounds fit any spare minute.
- Daily challenges and streaks build a fun, rewarding habit.
- Trophies, stats, and unlockable skins give lasting mot

newReleases.name: Control the Meeting
newReleases.desc:
Meeting Card Battle is a short strategy card game where you take the role of a meeting facilitator and try to guide a difficult meeting toward a final decision.

Each meeting includes participants with different personalities.
Some talk too much, some go off topic, some object to everything, some stay silent, some demand evidence, and some want decisions as quickly as possible.

Each turn, you choose one card from your hand.
Cards include actions such as summarizing the discussion, asking a question, using a whiteboard, hearing concerns, taking a vote, or making a decision.

However, card effects are not always predictable.
Participants react based on their personalities. A card may move the meeting forward, but it may also increase confusion, reduce satisfaction, or cost valuable time.

Your goal is to reach a decision before the meeting falls apart.
You win if the decision goal is reached while satisfaction and confusion stay under control.
You lose if satisfaction reaches zero, confusion becomes too high, or time runs out.

Cards are divided into three groups: Organize, Dialogue, and Force.
Repeating the same type of card too often can worsen the meeting atmosphere.
To win, you need to read the room, choose the right card, and balance progress with satisfaction.

Difficulty levels change the number of participants and how many people react each turn.
Lower difficulties are easier to manage, while higher difficulties create more unpredictable and chaotic meetings.

The rule

newReleases.name: Turnl: Daily Word Twist
newReleases.desc:
Turnl is a daily word puzzle with a twist — literally.

Every day brings one theme and a grid of scrambled letters hiding a handful of words. Twist 2×2 blocks of tiles to rotate them into place, and line up every hidden word across a full row or column. Solve them all to win.

It's simple to pick up and genuinely satisfying to finish. No timers breathing down your neck, no accounts to set up — just one clean puzzle a day.

WHY YOU'LL LIKE IT
• A new theme and word set every single day
• Twist-to-solve: rotate 2×2 blocks until the words snap into line
• Three difficulties — Easy, Standard, and Hard — pick your challenge
• Build a daily streak and watch it grow
• Share your result as a spoiler-free grid — compare with friends, never give the answers away
• Calm, refined design that gets out of your way

HOW TO PLAY
1. Read today's theme.
2. Twist 2×2 blocks of tiles to rotate the letters.
3. Line up each hidden word across a row or column.
4. Clear them all to solve the day — then share your grid.

A few minutes. One puzzle. Done your way.

Turnl is free to play. A full back-catalogue of past puzzles is coming soon.
newReleases.coreLoop: Turnl is a daily word puzzle with a twist — literally. Every day brings one theme and a grid of scrambled letters hiding a handful of words.

• Custom word libraries — use the built-in library or build your own with manual entry or AI-assisted generation.
• Quick rounds — each round wraps in under a minute. Full games run 5–10 minutes. Perfect for any pocket of free time.
• Spectator mode — watch a room before jumping in.
• Gifts and emoji — react in real time with stickers and gifts to make wins extra sweet.
• Multi-device — play on iPhone, iPad, or web. Same account, same rooms.
• Sign in with Apple, Google, or just a nickname.

HOW TO PLAY

1. Open the app, pick a nickname or sign in.
2. Tap "Quick Start" to auto-match into a room, or create your own.
3. When it's your turn as the hint giver, describe the secret word without saying it directly. Use synonyms, examples, sounds

newReleases.name: Sendero de Antonia

 RECOGE Y ENTREGA
Junta néctar por el prado y deposítalo en la Colmena para subir de nivel. Cuanto más cargas, más ágil debes ser.

ESCAPA DE LOS ESCARABAJOS
Te muerden y te roban el néctar (¡no te matan!). Pero si te quedas sin reservas, cuidado. Recupera lo robado llegando a su guarida.

USA TU INGENIO
• Veneno: los Escarabajos huyen y puedes cazarlos.
• Escondites: ocúltate entre las hojas, ahí no te tocan.
• Setos: los Escarabajos no los cruzan; tú sí. Protégete.

Her kart bir olaydır. Görevin, bu olayın zaman çizgisinde doğru yere ait olduğunu bulmak. Ne kadar az hata yaparsan, o kadar iyi sonuç alırsın.

newReleases.name: Meowdoku!
newReleases.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M
newReleases.coreLoop: Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

This is a puzzle game designed for moments of focus and relaxation. Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or enjoying a quiet break, the smooth flow and satisfying interactions make it easy to settle in and keep playing.

- Move pieces to complete parts of a picture

Explore a wide range of scenes, from nature and everyday objects to artistic compositions, all designed to be visually pleasing.
- Play at Your Own Pace
No timers, no pressure—just a relaxed environment where you can enjoy solving puzzles in your own time.
- Designed for Focus and Relaxation
A great choice for players who enjoy quiet, thoughtful gameplay that helps clear the mind.

updates.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
updates.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

updates.name: Pixel Flow!
updates.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
updates.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

updates.name: Amaze GO!
updates.desc:
Welcome to Amaze GO! A clean arrows puzzle escape built to calm a busy mind. Your goal is simple: guide each arrow out without a collision. The minimalist design cuts visual noise, reduces chaos, and helps you organize thoughts as you play. Plan the order, open paths, and enjoy a quiet flow. No timer. No pressure. Offline anywhere.

What makes Amaze GO! great
- Minimalist arrows puzzle escape that declutters the screen and the mind
- Works offline with quick loading and a clean interface that keeps attention on arrows
- Calm play loop for smart brains: think clearly, move each arrow with intent
- Smooth tap controls, clear path feedback, and satisfying arrow out moments
- Hints support focus when the grid feels tight

How to play
- Find the arrow with a free path to the edge
- Tap to pull that arrow out and open space for the next arrows
- Plan the order to secure a safe route and a clean arrow out
- Avoid blocked taps; a wrong arrow costs a heart for the level
- Use hints to highlight a safe arrow when your path is unclear
- Clear all arrows to finish the level and aim for a perfect arrow out

Why love this arrow puzzle
- Simple rules, deep strategy, and a mindful arrows puzzle escape
- Short breaks or longer sessions that ease stress and sharpen focus
- The last arrow out delivers a clear board and a mental reset
- Brain training for logic, planning, and spatial thinking
- Clean visuals and soft audio that reduce chaos and keep puzzles readable

Amaze GO! is a quiet arrows

updates.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
updates.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

Quick Play Guide

- Start Simple: Tap a bottle to pick it up, and another to pour the water. Organize the water so each bottle has only one color.
- Think Ahead: Pour water only if it matches the top color of the destination bottle and there’s room. Plan to avoid dead ends and strategically sort the colors.
- Embrace Complexity: With each level, sorting and matching require more thought. Every move is crucial.
- Utilize Magic Tools: Stuck? Use 'Undo' to reverse moves, or 'Shuffle' to rearrange the bottles anew, making sorting a breeze.

Cool Features

A game of teamwork and betrayal ...in space! Play online with 4-15 players as you attempt to prep your spaceship for departure, but beware as one or more random players among the Crew are Impostors bent on killing everyone.

MASTER YOUR SOCIAL DEDUCTION SKILLS.
Crewmates win by completing all tasks or discovering and voting the Impostors off the ship. The Impostor can use sabotage to cause chaos, making for easier kills and better alibis. Optional roles create a whole new level of gameplay. Try out the Scientist, Engineer, Guardian Angel, or Shapeshifter to create chaos! Think you’re a master of deception? Only one way to find out!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR GAME.
Choose how you want to play! Change the number of Impostors, roles, tasks, player visibility, and more. Play in style as you change your Crewmates’ color, visor, nameplate, outfit, and hat. More customization options are planned to be continually added in.

PLAY WITH ANYONE.
Cross-platform play is supported. Play with friends (or enemies?) between PC, mobile, or console!

If you have any issues, visit us at: https://www.innersloth.com/faq/

updates.name: Hole.io
updates.desc:
Welcome to Hole.io, the wildly satisfying eat-the-world game played by millions! Drop into busy New York, a creaky pirate cove, or a glowing sci-fi metropolis - and swallow it whole. Cars, lampposts, hot dogs and even giant skyscrapers! 

Whether you've got five minutes while watching your favorite show or an hour to unwind before bed, just tap, glide, and watch the city crumble into a black hole. No pressure, no stress - just the pure, oddly relaxing joy of eating everything in sight. 

EAT EVERYTHING
Start tiny, barely big enough to swallow a trash can. Grow huge, big enough to gulp down skyscrapers in one bite. The bigger you get, the louder the crunch. Pure satisfaction.  

THE PERFECT BREAK 
Easy to learn, instantly satisfying. Play in short bursts: morning coffee, lunch break, evening unwind. A relaxing, oddly soothing game for casual players.  

WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT 
- Wonderfully simple controls - just swipe and glide.
- Insanely satisfying gameplay - swallow, smash, and clear the map.
- Beautiful, vibrant 3D worlds packed with detail.
- Free to play, easy to love. 

Ready to swallow the world? Download Hole.io now and find out why millions of players can't put it down. Time to feed the black hole.

• MAP PROGRESS - Updated visuals and tutorials make tracking your path through each map smoother than ever.
• EVERY SCREEN, PERFECTLY FITTED - UI improvements across all devices for a seamless experience wherever you play.
 
Swallow it all. Update now!

updates.name: Castle Busters
updates.desc:
SMASH EVERY CASTLE. RULE EVERY ARENA.
Castle Busters is fast, loud, and unfair in the best way. Every brick breaks. Every shot counts. Draft 8 units, load your keep, and turn your rival's castle into a pile of rubble before they do it to you first. No grinding waves of bots. No 20-minute matches. Just real-time 1v1 PvP where one good angle wins the war.

DESTROY THE WALLS, NOT THE CLOCK
Matches are quick. Decisions are not. Pick your shot, read the enemy line, and fire. Every wall, tower and turret is destructible, so the map is never the same twice. Collapse a floor under an archer. Carve your own path, literally.

DRAFT YOUR SQUAD
Wrecker, Napalmer, Bomber, Scout, Fairy, Crow... Pick any 8. Each unit changes how you play, what angles you attack, and how you defend. Some builds are patient. Some are chaos. None of them are wrong if they win.

FORTIFY THE KEEP
Your castle is your army's home, shield, and weapon. Reinforce the walls that matter. Leave decoys. Bait your rival into breaking through somewhere they shouldn't. Defense isn't passive here, it's a trap.

THE FORGE
Upgrade your units. Strengthen your keep. Unlock new arenas with new hazards, new obstacles, new ways to break things. The deeper you go, the meaner the meta gets.

CLIMB THE LADDER
Climb your away towards Clash Colosseum. Arena by arena. Seasonal leaderboards. Rank matches against players who want your crown as badly as you want theirs. Only one castle stays standing. Sharpen your aim. Stack your squad. Cra

all.name: Control the Meeting
all.desc:
Meeting Card Battle is a short strategy card game where you take the role of a meeting facilitator and try to guide a difficult meeting toward a final decision.

Each meeting includes participants with different personalities.
Some talk too much, some go off topic, some object to everything, some stay silent, some demand evidence, and some want decisions as quickly as possible.

Each turn, you choose one card from your hand.
Cards include actions such as summarizing the discussion, asking a question, using a whiteboard, hearing concerns, taking a vote, or making a decision.

However, card effects are not always predictable.
Participants react based on their personalities. A card may move the meeting forward, but it may also increase confusion, reduce satisfaction, or cost valuable time.

Your goal is to reach a decision before the meeting falls apart.
You win if the decision goal is reached while satisfaction and confusion stay under control.
You lose if satisfaction reaches zero, confusion becomes too high, or time runs out.

Cards are divided into three groups: Organize, Dialogue, and Force.
Repeating the same type of card too often can worsen the meeting atmosphere.
To win, you need to read the room, choose the right card, and balance progress with satisfaction.

Difficulty levels change the number of participants and how many people react each turn.
Lower difficulties are easier to manage, while higher difficulties create more unpredictable and chaotic meetings.

The rule

Turnl is a daily word puzzle with a twist — literally.

Every day brings one theme and a grid of scrambled letters hiding a handful of words. Twist 2×2 blocks of tiles to rotate them into place, and line up every hidden word across a full row or column. Solve them all to win.

• A new theme and word set every single day

HOW TO PLAY
1. Read today's theme.
2. Twist 2×2 blocks of tiles to rotate the letters.
3. Line up each hidden word across a row or column.
4. Clear them all to solve the day — then share your grid.

A few minutes. One puzzle. Done your way.

all.name: Meowdoku!
all.desc:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.

Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
Simple Rules, Deep Strategy

The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

Key Features
• Pure & Immersive Experience
• Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
• Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.

Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards. Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone M

- Smooth, tactile physics — swipe, scoop, and watch the hole snap up anything in its path

- Fresh drops — regular events and new levels

How to play
- Drag to move the black hole
- Eat small items to grow larger
- Swallow the target treats to finish the level

- Look ahead: plan a clean route so you don’t block yourself
- Prioritize: gulp the light stuff first, then the big bites

all.name: Yarn Loop: Knit Puzzle
all.desc:
Yarn Loop is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game featuring colorful yarn bobbins and knitted patterns.

Bobbins move onto the conveyor and collect stitches of their own color. Each bobbin has a capacity value that decreases as stitches are picked up. When its capacity reaches zero, the bobbin disappears. If capacity remains, the bobbin is transferred to the rack and can be used again later.
 
Complete each knitted pattern by using the right bobbins in the right order.

Game Features
► Simple One-Tap Gameplay: Bobbins move smoothly through the conveyor system and collect matching stitches with ease.
► Color-Based Collection Mechanic: Each bobbin clears only the stitches of its own color.
► Capacity Management System: Every bobbin has a limited pickup value, creating thoughtful and satisfying puzzle decisions.
► Rack Reuse Function: Bobbins that still have capacity return to the rack and remain available for later use.
► Hundreds of Engaging Levels: New knitted layouts, color combinations, and puzzle arrangements appear throughout progression.
► Cozy Yarn Aesthetic: Soft textures, warm colors, and pleasant animations create a calm and enjoyable experience.

Yarn Loop offers a smooth, calm, and visually charming journey through handcrafted yarn puzzles.

all.name: Pixel Flow!
all.seller: Loom Games Oyun Yazilim ve Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
all.desc:
Conveyor’s ready, pigs are on standby. Tap to send a pig onto the conveyor so it rains balls onto pixel cubes of its own color. The number above its head is its ammo: that’s how many hits it makes. Run out and it leaves the stage; if not, it slips into one of the 5 waiting slots and, when you tap again, it jumps back on the conveyor to fire another round.
The conveyor has a capacity—push past the limit and you’ll need to wait. Send them in the right order, manage the flow, and hit the cubes to clear the board piece by piece. Simple mechanic, sticky loop: tap → flow → repeat.
Highlights
One-tap control: Quick sessions, easy one-handed play.
Color matching: Pigs only hit their own color—no target-picking hassle.
Conveyor capacity: Timing and queue management add a bite-size strategy layer.
5 waiting slots: Stack, sort, and launch at the perfect moment.
Short but “one more round” feel: Perfect for micro-breaks.
Satisfying pixel cleanup: Every hit leaves the board feeling crisp.
For anyone who loves fast action-puzzles, timing, and flow management. The pigs are ready. The cubes… not so much.

all.name: Zen Word® - Relax Puzzle Game
all.desc:
Playing Zen Word 10 minutes a day brings you incredible challenging and relaxing experiences.
 
Zen word is a challenging word game & brain game that helps to train your brain and sharpen your mind. Zen Word is much more challenging than most other word puzzle games. Unlike crossword puzzles games or word cross games or word scramble games, all words in Zen Word are uncrossed, without any logical connection that can give you hints to help you solve the puzzles.  In Zen Word, you need to search and connect the right letters to find 20 hidden words on average in each level to test your vocabulary. The length of the words is the only clue that will help you find all the words and solve the puzzles. Therefore, Zen Word has very high requirements for your vocabulary and spelling skills. All word puzzles in Zen Word are carefully designed and will definitely give you a completely different challenging experience. 

Also, Zen Word is very different from word-search games. In word search games, your objective is to find and mark all the words hidden inside the letters box. The arrangement of these words in word-search games has clear rules, even if you don't know the spelling of the words, you can still search and find all the hidden words to solve the puzzles. As you find more words, the difficulty of word search games gets easier. However in Zen Word, as you find more words, the difficulty of the game will increase sharply. The rest of the words are extremely hard for you to rememb

all.name: Among Us!
all.desc:
A game of teamwork and betrayal ...in space! Play online with 4-15 players as you attempt to prep your spaceship for departure, but beware as one or more random players among the Crew are Impostors bent on killing everyone.

MASTER YOUR SOCIAL DEDUCTION SKILLS.
Crewmates win by completing all tasks or discovering and voting the Impostors off the ship. The Impostor can use sabotage to cause chaos, making for easier kills and better alibis. Optional roles create a whole new level of gameplay. Try out the Scientist, Engineer, Guardian Angel, or Shapeshifter to create chaos! Think you’re a master of deception? Only one way to find out!

CUSTOMIZE YOUR GAME.
Choose how you want to play! Change the number of Impostors, roles, tasks, player visibility, and more. Play in style as you change your Crewmates’ color, visor, nameplate, outfit, and hat. More customization options are planned to be continually added in.

PLAY WITH ANYONE.
Cross-platform play is supported. Play with friends (or enemies?) between PC, mobile, or console!

If you have any issues, visit us at: https://www.innersloth.com/faq/

all.name: Hole.io
all.desc:
Welcome to Hole.io, the wildly satisfying eat-the-world game played by millions! Drop into busy New York, a creaky pirate cove, or a glowing sci-fi metropolis - and swallow it whole. Cars, lampposts, hot dogs and even giant skyscrapers! 

Whether you've got five minutes while watching your favorite show or an hour to unwind before bed, just tap, glide, and watch the city crumble into a black hole. No pressure, no stress - just the pure, oddly relaxing joy of eating everything in sight. 

EAT EVERYTHING
Start tiny, barely big enough to swallow a trash can. Grow huge, big enough to gulp down skyscrapers in one bite. The bigger you get, the louder the crunch. Pure satisfaction.  

THE PERFECT BREAK 
Easy to learn, instantly satisfying. Play in short bursts: morning coffee, lunch break, evening unwind. A relaxing, oddly soothing game for casual players.  

WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT 
- Wonderfully simple controls - just swipe and glide.
- Insanely satisfying gameplay - swallow, smash, and clear the map.
- Beautiful, vibrant 3D worlds packed with detail.
- Free to play, easy to love. 

Ready to swallow the world? Download Hole.io now and find out why millions of players can't put it down. Time to feed the black hole.

• NEW LOOK, SAME HUNGER - A redesigned in-game screen built for clarity, so nothing stands between you and your next meal.
• MAP PROGRESS - Updated visuals and tutorials make tracking your path through each map smoother than ever.
• EVERY SCREEN, PERFECTLY FITTED - UI improvements across all devices for a seamless experience wherever you play.
 
Swallow it all. Update now!

all.name: Castle Busters
all.desc:
SMASH EVERY CASTLE. RULE EVERY ARENA.
Castle Busters is fast, loud, and unfair in the best way. Every brick breaks. Every shot counts. Draft 8 units, load your keep, and turn your rival's castle into a pile of rubble before they do it to you first. No grinding waves of bots. No 20-minute matches. Just real-time 1v1 PvP where one good angle wins the war.

DESTROY THE WALLS, NOT THE CLOCK
Matches are quick. Decisions are not. Pick your shot, read the enemy line, and fire. Every wall, tower and turret is destructible, so the map is never the same twice. Collapse a floor under an archer. Carve your own path, literally.

DRAFT YOUR SQUAD
Wrecker, Napalmer, Bomber, Scout, Fairy, Crow... Pick any 8. Each unit changes how you play, what angles you attack, and how you defend. Some builds are patient. Some are chaos. None of them are wrong if they win.

FORTIFY THE KEEP
Your castle is your army's home, shield, and weapon. Reinforce the walls that matter. Leave decoys. Bait your rival into breaking through somewhere they shouldn't. Defense isn't passive here, it's a trap.

THE FORGE
Upgrade your units. Strengthen your keep. Unlock new arenas with new hazards, new obstacles, new ways to break things. The deeper you go, the meaner the meta gets.

CLIMB THE LADDER
Climb your away towards Clash Colosseum. Arena by arena. Seasonal leaderboards. Rank matches against players who want your crown as badly as you want theirs. Only one castle stays standing. Sharpen your aim. Stack your squad. Cra

all.name: Idle Dot Shooter!
all.desc:
Blast dots. Stack upgrades. Trigger chaos.

Idle Dot Shooter is a minimalist idle shooter built for incremental idle progress. Your turret auto-fires into drifting targets while you build an upgrade engine that turns tiny pops into massive gains. Add a drone, boost suction, and unleash bullet hell abilities when you want chaos. Pure idle dot shooter gameplay - a true idle bullet hell experience.

What you do:
Shoot dots to earn cash. Spend it on Defence, Drone, and Economy upgrades. Travel to new galaxies with tougher targets. Push your personal best as the top dot shooter on the global leaderboard. Bullet hell reimagined as an idle shooter: hold the line against endless dots.

Why Idle Dot Shooter is satisfying:
You're always one upgrade away from a new rhythm. Faster fire rate, bigger damage, denser spawns, stronger suction, higher value... then you watch the screen erupt into chaos as your earnings climb. That's the incremental idle loop every idle shooter fan craves.

Features:
Idle auto-shooting turret
